description_long: This object is a modern computer tower case, featuring a sleek black exterior with a mesh front panel that displays three large RGB-lit cooling fans. The front panel is visually striking due to the circular, multicolored LED lighting, which is a common feature in gaming or high-performance PC cases. The sides of the case are solid and unadorned, providing a minimalist look, while the rear panel includes standard cutouts for motherboard I/O, expansion slots, and a power supply unit. The case is constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with mesh elements for airflow and ventilation. The overall design is angular and robust, suitable for housing electronic components securely. This type of object is typically found in home offices, gaming setups, or tech workspaces in urban environments.
description: A black computer tower case with a mesh front panel featuring three RGB-lit fans, solid sides, and a standard rear I/O layout. The design is modern, angular, and built for housing electronic components.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large RGB-lit fans behind a mesh panel, providing a colorful and high-tech appearance.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid black panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing standard PC case cutouts for motherboard I/O, expansion slots, and power supply, with some ventilation grilles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also a plain, solid black panel mirroring the other side.
